Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 129 

RDLGY_OTHR_TCHNCL_SRVC_TXNMY_IND 

LABEL: Radiologic and Other Technical Services Taxonomy Indicator — Ever in Calendar Year 

DESCRIPTION: Indicates whether the provider’s taxonomy value maps to the technologists, technicians and other 
technical service provider category; ever in the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: RDLGY_OTHR_TCHNCL_SRVC_TXNMY_IND 

LONG NAME:
